event: Road in a Wood at Sunset
description: A dark, atmospheric landscape depicting a path or road leading through a dense wood at sunset. Tall mature trees with full canopies frame the composition on both sides, their trunks dark silhouettes against the warm golden-orange light of the setting sun visible through the branches in the center and at left. The foreground path is deeply shadowed in browns and blacks. The sky glows with warm amber and golden tones where visible through gaps in the foliage. The overall mood is deeply atmospheric and meditative.
